title: eleocharis palustris subsp. vigens
intro: Eleocharis palustris subsp. vigens, also known as the common spikerush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and is native to North America. The medicinal properties of Eleocharis palustris subsp. vigens lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, including soothing coughs, treating bronchitis, and reducing fever, making it a valuable herbal remedy for respiratory issues. Eleocharis palustris subsp. vigens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for the convenient and safe consumption of its medicinal properties.
